data.name: Error_ParentPinRequired
data.value: A PIN is required for the Parent role.

data.name: Error_PinFormat
data.value: The PIN must contain exactly 4 digits.

data.name: Error_PinMismatch
data.value: The PIN codes do not match.

data.name: Error_ConflictOpposite
data.value: A rule exists for "{2}" with action "{0}" which conflicts.

data.name: Error_ConflictDuplicate
data.value: A rule already exists for "{0}" on device "{1}".

data.name: Warning_AlreadyAssigned
data.value: Device "{0}" is already assigned to another profile.
